gksaxs A 3- insu lnL;ksa ds vykok ”kS{kf.kd ifj’kn ds lHkh lnL;ksa dk dk;Zdky rhu o"kZ gksxk A 4- ”kS{kf.kd ifj’kn dh cSBd ds fy, x.kiwfrZ de ls de nks ckgjh lnL;ksa ds lkFk&lkFk “kS{kf.kd ifj’kn ds dqy lnL;ksa ds vk/kss ls gksxh A 灹ो. सिचदान瀈द मोह瀈ती, कुलपित [िव榀ापन—III/4/असा./150/(381)] -- 2 of 4 -- ¹Hkkx IIIμ[k.M 4º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 CENTRAL UNIVERSITY OF ORISSA, KORAPUT NOTIFICATION Koraput, the 24th June, 2016 The amended Statute 2(4) The Vice-Chancellor shall hold office for a term of five years from the date on which he/she enters up on his/her office or until he/she attains the age of Seventy years or whichever is earlier. He /She shall be eligible for the re-appointment Amendment to Statute-11, Central Universities Act, 2009 for the Constitution of Executive Council of Central University of Orissa (1) The following shall be the composition of Executive Council of the University: i The Vice Chancellor; ii. Secretary, Dept. of Higher Education, MHRD, GOI or his/her nominee; iii. Secretary, Dept. of Higher Education, Govt. of Orissa, Bhubaneswar; iv. The Nominee of the Chairman of UGC, New Delhi; v. The Pro-Vice Chancellor; vi Four members from among Deans of Schools of Studies, by rotation according to seniority, to be appointed by the Vice Chancellor; vii. One Professor who is not a Dean by rotation according to seniority, to be appointed by the Vice Chancellor; viii. One Associate Professor, by rotation according to seniority, to be appointed by the Vice- Chancellor; ix. One Assistant Professor, by rotation according to seniority, to be appointed by the Vice- Chancellor; x. Two members of the Court, none of whom shall be an employee or a Student of the Univer- sity or an institution recognized by or associated with the University, to be nominated by the Visitor; xi. Four persons of distinction in academic and Public life to be nominated by the Visitor. (2) All the members of the Executive Council shall, other than the Vice-Chancellor, shall hold Office for a term of three years. (3) Half of the total members of the Executive Council with at least two outside members, shall form a quorum for a meeting of the Executive Council. Amendment to Statute-13, Central Universities Act, 2009 for the Constitution of Academic Council of Central University of Orissa 1. The Academic Council shall consist of the following members namely. i. The Vice-Chancellor. ii. The Pro-Vice Chancellor. iii. Deans of Schools of Studies. -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] iv. Head(s) of teaching Department(s)/Centre(s). v. 10 Professors (Excluding those who are Deans of Schools of Studies & Heads of the Department(s)/ Centre(s) on the basis of seniority and rotation to be nominated by Vice Chancellor giving due regard to representation of different Schools. vi. One Associate Professor who is not Head of Teaching Department by rotation according to seniority to be appointed by the Vice-Chancellor. vii. Five Assistant Professors by rotation according to seniority to be appointed by the Vice-Chancellor. viii. Librarian. ix. Five Persons not in the service of the University Co-opted by the Academic Council for their special knowledge in educational progress and development. 2. Dean, Students Welfare and Proctor shall be ex-officio members. 3. All members of the Academic Council, other than the ex-officio members, shall hold office for a term of three years. 4. Half of the total members of the Academic Council, with at least two outside members, shall form the quorum for the meeting of the Academic Council. Prof. SACHIDANANDA MOHANTY, Vice-Chancellor [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./150(381)] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 4 of 4 --
